SARAH.appearance: Shoulder-length black hair with slight wave, sharp brown eyes that narrow when suspicious, athletic build, small scar above left eyebrow, fair skin with slight freckles on cheeks
SARAH.clothing: Navy wool blazer over grey cashmere turtleneck, silver pendant necklace, dark jeans, leather ankle boots
SARAH.expression: Guarded, watchful, rarely smiles genuinely. Resting face appears slightly tense. Eyes dart to exits in new spaces.
SARAH.voice: Alto register, measured pace, drops pitch when lying or hiding something. Slight rasp from former smoking habit.
SARAH.distinguishing: Scar above left eyebrow, silver pendant always visible, habit of touching necklace when nervous

MARCUS.appearance: Grey-streaked black hair swept back, heavy brow ridge, athletic but starting to soften around the middle, weathered hands with visible veins, steel-grey eyes
MARCUS.clothing: Black leather jacket over dark henley, dark selvedge jeans, steel-toe boots, vintage watch on left wrist
MARCUS.expression: Controlled, predatory calm. Smiles with only the mouth, never reaches the eyes. Maintains intense eye contact uncomfortably long.
MARCUS.voice: Baritone, gravelly, pauses deliberately before important words. Lower volume than most speakers, forces others to lean in.
MARCUS.distinguishing: Vintage watch, leather jacket with small tear on left shoulder, habit of cracking knuckles one at a time

NARRATOR.voice: Deep, authoritative, measured. Provides context and internal thoughts.
NARRATOR.distinguishing: No visual. Voice only. Blue placeholder frames will be used.
